entry.title: New: Bill 24, CD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, ESTIMATED REVENUES AND DEPARTMENT OF FIRE AND PUBLIC SAFETY, FIRE/RESCUE OPERATIONS PROGRAM" The purpose of this bill is to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget, by: 1) amending Section 2, Estimated Revenues, by increasing Carryover/Savings from the General Fund by $300,000; 2) amending Section 3.B.7.c., Department of Fire and Public Safety, Fire/Rescue Operations Program, by increasing the appropriation for Category B - Operations & Equipment by $300,000; and 3) adjusting the totals accordingly.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
